name: Casey, Bob
subject: clock's ticking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d7b/51dbcc2a/10f09580/3ad6f68/433147000/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") This is it, team:

Tonight is our last major fundraising deadline. This is our last chance to show my opponent and his big-name Republican backers where we stand before Election Day.

Ever since the Trump administration took office, I have fought against the parts of their agenda that have put Pennsylvania families at risk: from their attempts to take away health care from millions of Pennsylvanians to their schemes that leave middle-class families behind while giving a break to the wealthiest 1%.

**_[I've been fighting for Pennsylvania families, and I'm going to keep fighting, but I need your help. As we approach our final major fundraising deadline, can you join me by making a donation to my campaign before midnight tonight?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181017_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

With so much on the line this year, we can't afford to lose and give the Trump administration another vote for their anti-middle-class agenda. Republicans are going to keep coming after me until Election Day, which is why I need your help to be ready to fight back.

**_[With just 20 days to go, and our last major deadline hours away, can you make a $5 donation to my campaign right now?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181017_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thank you,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181017_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? name: Team Menendez
subject: Four Pinocchios
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

ICYMI: _The Washington Post_ Fact Checker just released a new fact check on greedy CEO Bob Hugin's latest attack ad against Bob Menendez and let's just say, it wasn't good for Hugin. [](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce3/3af3c5d/3990c542/4ec30681/3192180470/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-huginad?gpsid=5_73_4523&refcode=em18_181017_HugAdR_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_HugAdR_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1") **FOUR PINOCCHIOS

"Hugin 'Fails Test' of Honesty"

"'no evidence' to back Hugin's claims"

"There's nothing new in the ad except for a dark descent into corrosive haze" ** Bob Hugin has proven once again that he lacks the integrity, honesty, and fitness to be a United States Senator. No one should be surprised that a man who got rich by preying on the sick and suffering, gouging cancer patients and putting them at risk for potentially deadly side effects, would have no qualms about lying to the people of New Jersey in order to get elected.

Hugin's attack ad is blatantly false, shameful, and a despicable act by a desperate man.

[**Help us fight back against Bob Hugin 's lies and correct the record for New Jersey voters. Chip in $5 right now to our Rapid Response Fund to help us stop the spread of these lies.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce3/3af3c5d/3990c542/4ec30680/3192180470/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-huginad?gpsid=5_73_4523&refcode=em18_181017_HugAdR_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_HugAdR_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Help+us+fight+back+against+Bob+Huginrsqu")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbced/24c69fd9/22861f43a/18ba7d5a/1413451000/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEV83N_digital_email_20181017_FECLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEV83N_digital_email_20181017_FECLastChance_inact")

Peter,

Tonight is the final FEC deadline before Election Day.

There are just a few hours left to hit our fundraising goal and help our candidates win.

Our ability to flip critical governors' seats and take back control of the House and Senate is on the line.

**Donate $3 before midnight to help hit our $400,000 goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-FEC-Deadline-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbced/24c69fd9/22861f43a/18ba7d5b/1413451000/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181014_email_FECDeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitFECDeadlineGo&utm_campaign=WQEFEV83N_digital_email_20181017_FECLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEV83N_digital_email_20181017_FECLastChance_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

subject: Important Early Voting Information
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Congress
body:

| Friends, **It’s official – today is the first day of early voting!** You can find your early voting locations right [here](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDA0NjEwOTEyMTYzNzMwNjkzJmM9bjZ4NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMDgxNTg3OTAmZD13NW80czhp.enEW6_TPLr6hZ2ZJnFca2O952S3SpEOgvJcitLBIkxo).
---
| | [ FIND YOUR EARLY VOTING LOCATION ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDA0NjEwOTEyMTYzNzMwNjkzJmM9bjZ4NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMDgxNTg3OTQmZD1sNW84cTNn.pbn3TCalI1FwxIIisS5xo6UyRHV6jKF-nNgJnog4D7E)

name: Tina
subject: We're at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Personal message before midnight.

| Since I cast my "no" vote on Brett Kavanaugh, we've seen a surge in enthusiasm in Trump's base that could really hurt our chances here in Minnesota. Now _Bloomberg_ is calling me one of the Senate _ "Democrats at risk"_ and saying _" Republicans have gained in recent polls on some of the closest contests."_ We can't let Mitch McConnell serve another two years as majority leader in the Senate passing every item on Trump's agenda. We have to win this race -- and that means hitting this goal before our final FEC deadline at midnight. I'm personally asking you to help us hold this Senate seat for Democrats and send a message across the country about what we're fighting for here. Please make a contribution before midnight for as much as you can. Every dollar helps us keep our ads on the air and our organizers reaching the voters we need to win: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal**](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181017-3_em-B&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") There are no special interests and no billionaires who can help us hit this goal before midnight. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tom=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: I need your help before midnight, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's late, and I don't want to take too much of your time -- so I'll be quick.
Friend, I need your help before midnight. The books are about to close on my last major FEC deadline before Election Day. And after my far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, outraised me in the third quarter -- we really can't afford to fall short tonight if we want to keep AZ-01 blue. It's late, and I don't want to take too much of your time -- so I'm just going to come out and ask. Can you make a donation at the link below, to help my campaign reach our goal and enter the final stretch of this race with enough resources? Here's the link: [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/midnightdeadline**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.17_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for your support, friend. I sincerely appreciate it. I won't win this race without you. Yours, Tom Sent from my iPhone | **DONATE**
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Trump, Robert E. Lee, Some Nut Hates Republicans, and Our First Debate Last Night
body:
Trump, Robert E. Lee, Some Nut Hates Republicans, and Our First Debate Last Night No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [ Trump, Robert E. Lee, Some Nut Hates Republicans, and Our First Debate Last Night](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-j/)
As I'm sure you know, President Trump came to town last Friday. And since I kind of had a ring side seat as the whole thing unfolded, I thought I'd share what I saw. He flew in on Air Force One (a smaller plane than the Boeing 747 he uses for international travel) into Lunken Airport. My Wife Donna and I, along with Mike Odioso, the President of the Green Township Republican Club, and Alysha Johnson, Co-Chair of Hamilton County for Trump, got to greet the President as he came down the stairway from the plane. He then walked over to the press traveling with him and answered some questions. Then he greeted a lot of enthusiastic folks there to welcome him, and then attended a fundraiser for my campaign inside one of the hangers, before caravaning to the Warren County Fairgrounds in Lebanon, Ohio for a rally. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [ A Smear Campaign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-d/)
I've had races over the years where my opponents and their left-wing Washington allies have attempted to distort my record and mislead voters. After all, this is politics, and as they say, "politics ain't beanbag." Another quote I remember hearing was "politics is a contact sport." I googled that phrase to see who said it, and it was me! No kidding. Try googling it. I thought I had heard it from someone else, but what the heck. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [ Our Next Ad](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-u/)
First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [PolitiFact is Anything But](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-n/)
President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-p/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-m/)
As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-c/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-a/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjkdwly-kujkulhluu-v/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Team Tabitha
subject: Have you seen the Feature Article on Tabitha in the NY Times Magazine?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Did you see it, Friend?!?

The New York Times Magazine did a Feature piece on Tabitha's campaign: [https://www.nytimes.com/2018/10/17/magazine/struggling-to-bring-the-blue-wave-to-deep-red-alabama.html]

The piece is exactly right in its depictions of the obstacles that stand in our way:
- A state culture where it's easier to come out as a gay man than as a Democrat.
- A dysfunctional state Democratic party.
- A mismatch between Alabama expectations and national Democratic expectations.

The piece is also exactly right in its depictions of Tabitha's unique strengths:
- Her deep connection to the church and to her personal faith.
- Her comfort in a variety of cultural spaces.
- Her passion, drive, and commitment to serving the people of AL-02.

What this piece gets wrong, however, is the conclusion. The writer concludes that "her road to victory is nearly nonexistent." But we know better.

Tabitha's incredible perseverance in the face of daunting odds caught the attention of the New York Times. And it has already caught the attention of nearly 35,000 people across the country who have sent in small donations to keep us moving forward. Our polling shows that if we can get the message out about who Tabitha is and what she stands for, the people of Alabama's 2nd district will vote for her. But we need your help. The DCCC and Emily's List aren't coming to our rescue, but you can.

Support this underdog!

Donate Now! https://secure.ngpvan.com/psnahu5gm0iQTzHK1WIdBA2

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Connect With Us:
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]
Phone: 334-425-8626

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36106

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/IceaFEKLj_1V4mbsyL5KkyyOGmsNm85GOghtfiXqNMw=/FkCYmL3iK3DX8Io7CKglhGcfSlAqLb_ii6MMxZ0n0tw=) Friends and Neighbors -- Another day, another endorsement -- this time, it's from the _Palm Beach Post! _ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/IceaFEKLj_1V4mbsyL5KkyyOGmsNm85GOghtfiXqNMw=/u2DomPbAPecTqJ9ZwzX_jaPELM8dfnLtpSXC5_84Y2g=?guid=5d52924e-9a96-460a-9b0e-018a7f83d0a2&pbid=daf23f94-2232-4d82-b9c7-dbfb5ce03674&utm_source=app.pagesuite&utm_medium=app-interaction&utm_campaign=pagesuite-epaper-html5_share-article) [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/IceaFEKLj_1V4mbsyL5KkyyOGmsNm85GOghtfiXqNMw=/WfkHXz5Cqe0h864Nx9acbbnUAhjIpDEt-qp8JgI_HDM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) In recommending Jeremy to be our next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), the Post wrote "If you were choosing the business manager for the state of Florida, you'd want someone with experience in finance and investing. That's obvious. It would be even better if he or she were experienced in running a large corporate enterprise. Better still if they'd started businesses and had a feel for technology. That being the checklist, the choice for Florida chief financial officer is easy." The Post also noted that our opponent "Jimmy Patronis, helps run his family's longstanding seafood restaurant in Panama City. He was a Republican state representative from the Panhandle until Gov. Rick Scott put him on the state Public Service Commission and then named him, last year, as Florida CFO when the well-regarded Jeff Atwater resigned for a job at Florida Atlantic University." [**(Click here to read the full recommendation).**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IceaFEKLj_1V4mbsyL5KkyyOGmsNm85GOghtfiXqNMw=/u2DomPbAPecTqJ9ZwzX_jaPELM8dfnLtpSXC5_84Y2g=?guid=5d52924e-9a96-460a-9b0e-018a7f83d0a2&pbid=daf23f94-2232-4d82-b9c7-dbfb5ce03674&utm_source=app.pagesuite&utm_medium=app-interaction&utm_campaign=pagesuite-epaper-html5_share-article) **Most importantly, the Post points out that Jeremy has "the right resume for Chief Financial Officer".**
This enthusiastic endorsement - in addition to others by the _Tampa Bay Times_ and _the Sun Sentinel -_ is just another example of our great momentum in this race. But as we get increasingly closer to November 6th, every single dollar will count towards our success in getting out Jeremy's message of accountability and an innovation economy and getting out the _**VOTE.**_ **

And we simply cannot do this without your help.** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help us keep this momentum going - and get Jeremy into the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/IceaFEKLj_1V4mbsyL5KkyyOGmsNm85GOghtfiXqNMw=/WfkHXz5Cqe0h864Nx9acbbnUAhjIpDEt-qp8JgI_HDM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Anthony Pardal** Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump Smashes Regs, Cuts $33 Billion vs. $245 Billion Added by Obama
body:
| |
---
# _President Trump Smashes Regs, Cuts $33 Billion vs. $245 Billion Added by Obama_
“President Trump’s promise to cut Obama-era regulations has gone into overdrive, with the slashing generating $33 billion in savings, far more than expected,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_. “A new report from the White House budget office said that $23 billion in savings has occurred this year alone, with the total at $33 billion since the president took office.” **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/trump-smashes-regs-cuts-33-billion-vs-245-billion-added-by-obama)** In **[_The Washington Post_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/the-trump-administration-is-deregulating-at-breakneck-speed/2018/10/17/09bd0b4c-d194-11e8-83d6-291fcead2ab1_story.html?utm_term=.10d7dcf6d230)** , Neomi Rao, Administrator of the Office of Information and Regulatory Affairs, explains how the Trump Administration is cutting regulations at breakneck speed. “Since President Trump took office, farmers can more productively use their land. Small businesses can hire more workers and provide more affordable health care. Innovators are freer to pursue advances in autonomous vehicles, drones and commercial space exploration. Veterans enjoy expanded access to doctors through a telehealth program. And infrastructure can be improved more quickly with streamlined permitting requirements.” “Too bad, the media is missing a great presidency,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in _[**The Washington Times**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/17/trumps-performance-on-the-economy-and-trade-is-unp/)_. “President Trump is demonstrating both to predecessors and future presidents all the good that can come when the person in the Oval Office thinks 24/7 about how to grow this economy and raise the wages of the men and women of America, particularly those who work with their hands.” “Marine Sgt. Maj. John Canley’s astounding heroism in Vietnam 50 years ago speaks for itself, so loudly that Wednesday he was awarded the Medal of Honor by President Donald Trump at a White House ceremony,” Tom Vanden Brook and David Jackson write in **[_USA Today_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2018/10/17/medal-honor-trump-awards-medal-vietnam-vet-john-canley/1671621002/)**. “John raced straight into enemy fire over and over again, saving numerous American lives,” President Trump said. On Tuesday, Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence traveled to Georgia to survey recovery efforts following Hurricane Michael. “The camaraderie amongst farmers and families has only strengthened since last Wednesday, something Pence says he noticed,” **[WTXL](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&http://www.wtxl.com/news/vice-president-pence-visits-georgia-following-hurricane-michael/article_177db27e-d183-11e8-b4e3-2bc57b7a16b6.html)** reports.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDEzMDgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQxMzA4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNjg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Less than 3 weeks to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian,

We are less than three weeks out from Election Day, and early voting starts October 24.
The Manchin team has been all over West Virginia talking to voters about Joe and what's at stake in 2018.

With so much going on, I'll keep it short.

SNEAK PEEK OF NEW TV AD

What do Jerry West, Bob Huggins, and Nick Saban all have in common? First of all they are proud West Virginians. Secondly, they all star in a new television ad for Joe's campaign.

[WATCH IT HERE. See it before it hits the airwaves.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfNTX0l3quUzPd5pvJBvhoiRZ8%2fOJ8xRfW9UgUC9FFHpDz%2bFcRzDQ2GzSgHpOZcqN824qN0EhpJZJejkm%2fXxNYMV8Oe2MrYzZb7UeN2OuxPUg%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC41lllz%2fgxNCEF1R%2f%2fN5U7%2faueWA02PsrLjruddv6vCctcdSjQXu6QuIk3QCPhOwCSGOCXHbChopvfqXff9f%2fev97a%2fYodL4Bmg%3d%3d)

WHAT IS PATRICK MORRISEY TRYING TO HIDE????

The [Charleston Gazette-Mail reported](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1nrE8P441a634V1QhzY1y7Lv3Ie1b%2f1N4KSrLV7J8aLsMOFKECXrmYzcK2yQurtyIO4Rlz%2b%2f1%2bpJDFyevFxkpVpBdHd7sc6wcmhiZSm3L7YfvrXbyJgWqYfYp4fqw7tfQXTT62qWDiZ2HMvJvdYFHuHcg%2b7Ws%2bAFej%2b%2bMfyCY1XdulcYZFd3deiIKytjY1vAyI%2feoSlb2wkWx%2b0xNXYXbpaRS4Ne8BZ17mEPjknfhaxmNw7U0dk2pI4GOKhLcFHDrGZa%2bXypAunS7BfWNqrdNww%3d%3d) that Patrick Morrisey is being sued for refusing to release documents about his ties to the drug industry and one of the major players in the opioid crisis.

Morrisey was exposed for hiding documents from the public for over a year because he doesn't want West Virginians to know just how cozy he is with the opioid companies poisoning West Virginia. What is Pat Morrisey hiding?

The lawsuit says Morrisey has a history of hiding information about his relationship with one of the companies that has given him thousands in political contributions. [Read more here.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1nrE8P441a634V1QhzY1y7Lv3Ie1b%2f1N4KSrLV7J8aLsMOFKECXrmYzcK2yQurtyIO4Rlz%2b%2f1%2bpJDFyevFxkpVpBdHd7sc6wcmhiZSm3L7YfvrXbyJgWqYfYp4fqw7tfQXTT62qWDiZ2HMvJvdYFHuHcg%2b7Ws%2bAFej%2b%2bMfyCY1XdulcYZFd3deiIKytjY1vAyI%2feoSlb2wkWx%2b0xNXYXbpaRS4Ne8BZ17mEPjknfhaxmNw7U0dk2pI4GOKhLcFHDrGZa%2bXypAunS7BfWNqrdNww%3d%3d)

BIG ENDORSEMENTS

This week, Joe was endorsed by both the Charleston Area Chamber of Commerce and the Huntington Regional Chamber Commerce. See why local business leaders support Joe [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsv2q6MYCr7un0f4OFFVv%2btmEqUTyaHkLLNARasq%2bOh6ZrRHIE6n1z0XiH4lh%2bbwpYLemkyVeqFzuzecaUWG9y0rW3REUzRRIqZJV5TOQf7i3TkkD%2f17FMfBOz0p9RDlCg976s0okxc7oirWLbnqBmc).

[Did you see the #IKnowJoe Business Leaders video?](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfum9mvb7JLL7axZcJ1PEfbZxJHog6TqVApUf%2fZ6ggly4ssNHl2Uzll%2bIWEOs7eLX7CYsKTLbMoQI%3d)

The Senior Power PAC has also endorsed Joe Manchin. The West Virginia Directors of Senior and Community Services Senior Power Political Action Committee represents senior centers across the state and its 3,740 employees. The association's members provide services in all 55 counties, including preparing and delivering nearly 2.5 million meals each year. They know Joe is a reliable advocate for seniors. [Learn more here.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAvhCBMHWYgZkrga1eiYvgiZR3TRz4SjREQSonQ7U4yXKFZkFf8UtiNxOMm7ksoI40uEY9cRBksJD9XUXIaWQ3Pq5AnejnEuiwEjWZaa%2ffZEYtRX67f0s32OYY%2fR%2bpVTg%2b4%3d)

HONORING OUR VETERANS

Joe joined General Stanley McChrystal at the annual Roosevelt-Kennedy Dinner this past weekend to pay tribute to West Virginia's veterans. His speech focused on thanking veterans for their service and sacrifice, and that working together is the only way for our nation to overcome the challenges we face.

MORRISEY CAN'T HIDE

This cartoon is worth 1,000 words. [Share it on Facebook](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2IDdhf7d27j2jJ5C%2f4lxOXwcAwb9a15pnlVehH5BciN6KXJrOoa1YXOJDO588zBdNZE54tDDcypZ%2b1M33XqxDJMtAOF1OIIya6HYeBdR5V3s5RsF2%2fM1TJB%2fyZi9W1dnBpfVigf8bHMGrXXmvKShL0Q7f0FRDx9Xvm3).

HOT ON THE TRAIL

The campaign has been in high gear for quite a while, and now we are ramping up for a strong finish. We've had Joe and volunteers at events in every corner of West Virginia nearly every weekend this fall.

Thank you for all of your support,
Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIfk1saEUu7sCpkKiPKWeFAA39Mj81nIJrkwSXCpHiCsdglL688TBTZjDCMRuJ6TllLW17x0PuzWAjVhVuoF8gDofd8%2fYwc1N%2b1TDvjLgFbPzWUTNpMosqtC46il%2f9xVQDG0%3d)

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Help elect progressive Latino candidates this November
body:
Activist - **Since President Trump and the Republican majority in Congress was elected in 2016, we 've seen unprecedented attacks on our values, our basic rights and needs, and our dignity.** **From the GOP 's countless efforts to repeal our health care to the Trump Administration's cruel and inhumane family separation policy, people across this country have suffered at the hands of this dangerous agenda, and enough is enough.** **At Latino Victory, we 're building political power and helping groundbreaking, progressive candidates like Ammar Campa-Najjar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Lupe Valdez do what it takes to win their races up and down the ballot this November.** [**If you 're with us and want to help elect progressive Latino leaders who will fight back and create positive change in local, state, and federal government, add your name to join Latino Victory now.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Na3U4/6/Dd/r5cs/6fxxs8/zTQx8pvr0E/P/P) **In 2018, we 're seeing more Latino candidates - especially Latina women - run for office than ever before. It's time for a new wave of progressive leadership and representation, and Latinos are fighting to make it happen this Election Day.** **With just a few weeks left until voters head to the polls, we need as much support as possible so we can knock on doors, make phone calls, and get out the vote for candidates who will make a difference.** [**Will you sign up to join Latino Victory and help our progressive candidates win big across the country on November 6th?**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Na3U4/s/Dd/r5cs/6fxxs8/z3vs4Of8v4/P/P) **This year 's midterms are only the beginning of our movement to elect leaders we deserve and create the change we wish to see in every level of government. Our work is just getting started - I hope you'll stand with us and help us make history.** **¡ Adelante!** **Crist obal Alex
President, Latino Victory**
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDMxLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjU3OTEzNTQ1)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

So this couldn't have come at a more critical moment: **A generous group of donors has offered to MATCH EVERY GIFT to help us hit our $200,000 goal before Nevadans start voting in just 2 days.**

name: Phil Bredesen 2018
subject: BREAKING: Bredesen: 44% -- Blackburn: 43%
body:
|
#
Peter -- **A new Vanderbilt poll just came out showing us up just 1 point over Congresswoman Blackburn.** But I don’t want you to get distracted by yet another poll -- here’s why: _**The only poll that matters is at the voting booth.**_ And right now, out-of-state dark money groups are drowning the state in false, negative attack ads to tear down Governor Bredesen as Tennesseans are casting their ballots in early voting. They want to make this race about the nasty hyper-partisan shouting that protects the Washington status quo, not the issues that matter to voters here in Tennessee. We can’t afford to let them distract voters this close to Election Day, so we have to ask again for your help. **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us shake off these Washington attacks? name: Match Alert
subject: New Hampshire needs a change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Just walked out of a meeting with my team, friends. We need to raise $11,322 before our midnight match deadline, and I need your help.
If we're going to win in New Hampshire and take back the governor's office for Democrats, we must take full advantage of this rare match opportunity to have every dollar go twice as far.

New Hampshire is headed in the wrong direction under Chris Sununu. I'm running to replace him and make the corner office accountable to families like yours - not special interests.

**That's why I'm refusing ANY donations from corporations. But**** if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can, right now. **
**Friends, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important. You can use this link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyforgovernoremails](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a44/d0ce7de/5017fcbc/9cdbd6e/1484180658/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjE2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk216-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so grateful to have your support.
Thank you.
Molly

body:

Help Steve Sisolak keep up the momentum and defeat Adam Laxalt >>

That's thanks to the thousands of supporters like you who have stepped up in the past few weeks. You're helping spread Steve's message across this state, allowing us to fight back against the repeated attacks by the Kochs and other wealthy Laxalt allies.

We know this race is going to be close, so this lead won't last unless we keep it up.

**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more this morning to help Steve Sisolak build on this momentum?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MO9fcKY5iJvYOiB7VWzpcl_gaehSgmdoUh2Dfmz7ZwY=/5ubttU4bYHgMzSDWBOn5Wfm5Llay0ts6EDM20GdvMA0=?gpsid=37_57_4529&refcode=em18_181018_voxpol_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_voxpol_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Chris Sloan

Steve Sisolak for Governor

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Is your faith under pressure?
body:
Peter,
Imagine being arrested for alleged political activity and your belief in God — then falsely imprisoned for what could be the remainder of your life.
The Bible is filled with stories of heroes of the faith under enormous pressure, including false imprisonment. And today we have a modern-day hero of the faith in U.S. Pastor Andrew Brunson.
After two years of languishing in a Turkish prison, Brunson was released—thanks to your prayers, the tireless efforts of faith groups and the unwavering support of many elected officials in Washington, D.C. and, most importantly, the hand of God.
What was the one thing Brunson constantly did while under pressure? Whether in prison or in the Oval Office with President Trump, Brunson was committed to this one thing:
“...he got down on his knees and prayed, giving thanks to his God, just as he had done before” (Daniel 6:10 NIV)
But this is not the posture we are seeing in our nation today.
Consider the brawls in the streets of Portland and the recent verbal attacks from politicians. One politician this election season said, “When they go low, we kick them.” Another said, “You cannot be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for." And still, some politicians are now calling for people to “get up in their faces,” of anyone with opposing political beliefs.
Christians have always been under political pressure, and in this election season, it’s not letting up. So, how do we stand for biblical values in the midst of political strife?
First and foremost, faith under pressure prays.
“If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin and will heal their land” (2 Chronicles 7:14 NIV).
Faith under pressure also stands for what is right.
In America, we are still blessed to live in a _free_ country where we can exercise our God-given rights. In many countries, you cannot.
**This privilege should propel us to stand and vote for our biblical values this midterm election—not sit on the sidelines.**
You are likely planning to vote, but millions of Christians across the country are still undecided if their vote will even matter on November 6th.
**[Will you join me in fighting for religious liberty by donating today to our midterm election campaign of equipping and motivating Christians to vote](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181018apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=1)?**
My Faith Votes is motivating and equipping Christians in critical states across the country to **Pray** , **Think** about the issues from a biblical perspective, and then **Vote**!
In these final weeks, we need to reach more Christians in six specific states: Indiana, Florida, Missouri, Nevada, Arizona, and Texas.
Faith voters in these states can be the difference in advancing biblical values in their state and our nation.
**[We need your donations to magnify our reach to these voters today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181018apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=2)!****Together, we can****activate people of faith to vote for religious liberty and the sanctity of life at the voting box.**
When Christians vote, we protect our religious freedoms both here and abroad.
God bless Andrew Brunson and his family for their example of faith under pressure.
I pray his example serves as a reminder to us that the religious freedom we have in America must be protected. Our call is to rise above the political bickering and advance biblical principles with our votes!
**[Please prayerfully joining with us in these final weeks to reach 90 million Christians](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181018apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=3)! **
Thank you for partnering with us in this critical mission.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181018apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=5)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181018apl01nd&n=6).

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: We're making last decisions, right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We only have until midnight.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bec/1514825329/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A") Friend, This is it -- today is our FINAL mid-month deadline. What we raise today helps decide what we can do with the time we have left. We're making final decisions -- where we can send our volunteers, what we can put on the air, and how we can truly fight back and win this thing. And exactly one week from today, early voting starts in Maryland -- we can't afford to fall short. **We have a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight -- and we're just $8,654 away. This is a grassroots campaign funded by you, not corporate-backed special interests.** [**We're counting on folks like you to fund this fight, so I'm asking right now: Can I count on you to donate $5 or more before our midnight mid-month deadline?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bec/1514825329/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bef/1514825329/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bee/1514825329/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A&amount=25&express_lane=true")

---

| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986beb/1514825329/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bea/1514825329/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A&express_lane=true")
---
Governor Hogan's leadership style is all about inaction -- what's good enough to get by is good enough, and we shouldn't strive for more.
That's not what we're about: We're a campaign built on the idea that we can always strive for bigger and better things, and that Maryland is worth it. We have huge plans for these final weeks, but we can only get them done if we have the budget.
We'll never be able to match Governor Hogan's corporate-backed campaign war chest, but we can fight back the best way we know how: With grassroots actions, fueled by grassroots donations.
**We can win if folks like you invest now when it counts: We're $8,654 away from meeting our $50,000 FINAL mid-month goal, and we can't afford to miss it now.** [**Donate $5 or more to fund the fight for a better Maryland before tonight's FINAL mid-month deadline.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bec/1514825329/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A")
Thanks,
Travis
Travis Tazelaar
Campaign Manager
Ben Jealous for Governor

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37950c/7ab0e2c4/7e14df02/34986bec/1514825329/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10188A")
---

PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Stacy Schuster
subject: we’re making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc

I'm asking so we can keep our efforts, up and down the ticket, going through Election Day. [**Do you think you can spare $5, $10, or more to help?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d5/1839836724/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181010?refcode=dwse181010_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d4/1839836724/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181010?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181010_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d4/1839836724/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181010?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181010_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d4/1839836724/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDEwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181010?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181010_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d7/1839836724/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181010?refcode=dwse181010_m_other&refcode2=861769")** There's no reason to be long-winded. Executing our plan for victory takes resources -- resources that make a difference. [**So if you can get us even $5 or $10 closer to this October goal, I'd sincerely appreciate it.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c86/622b7b5b/1d401b63/307b68d5/1839836724/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181010?refcode=dwse181010_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for everything you do. Debbie

name: Team Bredesen
subject: Big takeaway from today’s poll
body:
|
#
Peter, one of the biggest takeaways from the Vanderbilt poll released this morning is **how many voters in Tennessee are still undecided -- 8%.** That means that this race can still swing in either direction as voters head to the polls for early voting this week. We know we’re giving voters a clear choice in this election: Phil Bredesen is running to get things done, while Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn is running to keep the Washington status quo of hyper-partisan shouting and gridlock. **But this election is going to come down to more than just having the right message -- we need to put that message in front of undecided voters, get our supporters to the polls, and beat back out-of-state dark-money attacks. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us get it done?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2711867/16681851/-1405430810?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWViYWFmZi0xMGQzLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llknWHtf2BFKphE9SSADv8A2IVElUuH0wiQOG0bwhGc=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181018-poll-2-express&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******
---
If we keep this up until Election Day, we’ll win this race, and send a message to the Swamp: we’re ready to fix Washington.
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Bredesen

Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party
---

name: Dolores Huerta
subject: Sí Se Puede con Beto!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

As the co-founder of the United Farm Workers Union and President of the
Dolores Huerta Foundation, I have been fighting for women's rights,
workers' rights and civil rights for more than 60 years!

It's critical that we elect a leader to the U.S. Senate: Beto O'Rourke of
Texas.

We need leaders who put workers and the community first, who will work
across the aisle to improve our lives, who will listen to voters to get
the job done. Beto will fight for affordable healthcare, for a living
wage, and for American families. He will fight for policies that
strengthen and unite families -- not tear them apart.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181018&t=1019&akid=19275%2E444211%2EnPQUPa ]But we have to help Beto win by getting out the vote. So please join
me by making a contribution of
$3
or more to support the hard work on the ground so we can win.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181018&t=1020&akid=19275%2E444211%2EnPQUPa ]Contribute
$3
»

I know Beto will be a powerful voice in the U.S. Senate. But it will take
all of us to help push him over the top.

Sí se puede!

Dolores Huerta

subject: "Democrats' Chance of Taking the Senate Fading"

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1ee/2a380d31/36ead524/f16d85/2896246232/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Yikes -- "Democrats' Chance of Taking the Senate Fading" is NOT the headline we want to see just 19 days before the election.
To make matters worse, _RollCall_ says that **Republican Kevin Cramer is "opening up a clear lead" of vulnerable Senator Heidi Heitkamp**, and her race is an absolute MUST win if Democrats are going to retake Senate control.
Heidi desperately needs our help to win her reelection -- _especially_ after her politically courageous "no" vote on Brett Kavanaugh. clean_body: "" "" Yikes -- "Democrats' Chance of Taking the Senate Fading" is NOT the headline we want to see just 19 days before the election. To make matters worse, RollCall says that Republican Kevin Cramer is "opening up a clear lead" of vulnerable Senator Heidi Heitkamp, and her race is an absolute MUST win if Democrats are going to retake Senate control. Heidi desperately needs our help to win her reelection -- especially after her politically courageous "no" vote on Brett Kavanaugh. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Heidi Heitkamp and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" It's crunch time and the outcome of this race could come down to you, so thank you for stepping up. -- Team Maggie ""

Friends,
For the first time in a decade, [the United States has been named the world's most competitive economy](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=131A151A9A3897). Our unified Republican government's pro-growth policies are working, and the American people are better off now than we were just two short years ago.
As your representative in Congress, I will always fight for policies that unleash the private sector and create jobs right here in this country. I'm looking forward to seeing this strong momentum continue for my children and yours.

\- Martha

name: Take Back The Senate
subject: scary fundraising numbers from Bob's opponent -- help fight back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c84/51dbcc2a/10e05789/3ad641b/3875868636/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") This isn't good, seriously.

Thanks to donations from supporters like you, Bob has always outraised his opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta. That money has helped organize volunteers, mount a strong field program and spread Bob's message to every corner of the Commonwealth. But we just found out that over the last few months, Bob and Barletta raised the same amount of money. It's no secret that Republicans in Washington want to flip Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat and hold on to their Senate majority this year, which is why Barletta is gaining on Bob.

**_[Democrats have no hope at taking back the Senate majority if Bob loses, and if we don't retake the fundraising lead, Republicans will come after Bob. Can you rush $5 right now to help Bob?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security are all on the line, so losing Bob's voice in the Senate could be catastrophic. Barletta voted for corporate tax cuts and to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and now he's gaining momentum in his campaign against Bob.

**There's too much on the line this year to risk losing Bob. What can you give today to help?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181018_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

clean_body: "" This isn't good, seriously. Thanks to donations from supporters like you, Bob has always outraised his opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta. That money has helped organize volunteers, mount a strong field program and spread Bob's message to every corner of the Commonwealth. But we just found out that over the last few months, Bob and Barletta raised the same amount of money. It's no secret that Republicans in Washington want to flip Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat and hold on to their Senate majority this year, which is why Barletta is gaining on Bob. "" Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security are all on the line, so losing Bob's voice in the Senate could be catastrophic. Barletta voted for corporate tax cuts and to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and now he's gaining momentum in his campaign against Bob. There's too much on the line this year to risk losing Bob. What can you give today to help? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Friend --

Here are the facts:
* There are **LESS THAN THREE WEEKS** until the election.

* **Polls are tightening** across the country, and **Republicans are gaining ground.**

* We have no time to waste -- it is time to expand our ad buy and **turn out our voters.**

* **The FINAL filing deadline of this campaign is next Monday at midnight** , and we need your help.

* **We 've set a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters like you before this all-important deadline.** We need to show Tim and Peggy that we have their back, _AND_ we need to make sure we fully fund our voter outreach efforts.

**Monday at midnight is our most critical deadline yet** : It is the final chance to show the strength of this grassroots campaign. **We need you now.**

**Will you rush a contribution and help us meet our critical goal right now? >>>>**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: In Montana, the economy is booming
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 18, 2018
## Video of the day
**This evening** , President Donald J. Trump is headed to Montana, where the Administration’s economic agenda is paying off for hardworking Americans. [**Watch: In Montana, the economy is booming.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDQ3MDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQ0NzA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzMDQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1053040798571356162)
## **The 300th Marine Medal of Honor recipient**
**Yesterday, President****Trump****proudly awarded** Sergeant Major John Canley the Congressional Medal of Honor. “Fifty years ago, an American Marine fought with unmatched bravery in one of the longest and bloodiest battles of the Vietnam War—the Battle of Hue City,” the President said. **While serving as Company Gunnery Sergeant,** Canley led attacks for three days against multiple enemy-fortified positions while exposing himself to enemy fire to carry wounded Marines to safety. On February 6, 1968, at a hospital compound, he twice scaled a wall in full view of the enemy to aid his injured companions. **Sergeant Major Canley saved many American lives** as he raced through enemy fire repeatedly, ultimately defeating a large group of communist fighters. “America is the greatest force for peace, justice, and freedom the world has ever known because of you and people like you,” President Trump told Canley at the White House yesterday. **[Watch Sgt. Major Canley become the 300th Marine to receive the Medal of Honor.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDQ3MDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQ0NzA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzMDQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1052672908970131456)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
First Lady Melania Trump visits with children affected by neonatal abstinence syndrome of the Maternal Addiction, Treatment, Education and Research (MATER) program at Thomas Jefferson University Hospital in Philadelphia | **October 18, 2018**
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDQ3MDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQ0NzA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzMDQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDQ3MDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQ0NzA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzMDQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE4Ljk2NDQ3MDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxOC45NjQ0NzA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzMDQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: we could lose the House by ONE seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
You've probably heard a lot of talk lately about a "blue wave" -- a surge in grassroots enthusiasm that could propel Democrats up and down the ballot to victory. But blue wave won't happen if Democrat
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e45/1a8421e1/19affcdd8/4942b44b/828330369/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, You've probably heard a lot of talk lately about the "blue wave" \-- a surge in grassroots enthusiasm that could propel Democrats up and down the ballot to victory next month. But the blue wave won't happen if Democrats don't turn out to vote by November 6th, team. _CBS News_ recently projected that Democrats stand to make big gains in Congress next month, but it's far from guaranteed. In fact, according to _CBS_ , if voter turnout is low -- _we will lose the House by ONE seat._ _[**(Chip in right here to make sure that doesn 't happen.)**](http://action.tomohalleran. subject: FW: We need to keep Indiana RED!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
**MAKE SURE TO RSVP FOR 10/22 RALLY!** See event details & help the Indiana GOP get out the vote; early voting is already underway! | | | Hey! Wanted to make sure you saw this note from Donald Trump, Jr.

He’s excited to come back to Indiana – and we’re excited to have him! Join Donald Trump, Jr., Kimberly Guilfoyle, Governor Holcomb, Mike Braun, Greg Pence and our all-star Right Track Republican team on Monday at 4 p.m. for an EPIC rally. Doors open at 2:30 p.m. and the pre-program starts at 3:30 p.m.

**[RSVP here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3742c6b5f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)!**

Sincerely,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

* **Sent from my iPhone. Sorry for typos** *

**From:** Donald Trump Jr.
**Sent:** Tuesday, October 16, 2018 at 4:17 PM
**Subject: **We need to keep Indiana RED!
---
|
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/final-push-to-election-day-467473?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1974780fef&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b23d4c6a04&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>")
---
| [See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12e1e51dc6&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>")
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=84b2330aa3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friend,

I've had the opportunity to spend quite a bit of time in Indiana over the years.

It's a special place, _where conservative values and principles are working to deliver big results_.

And I can't wait to see everyone at the HUGE Right Track Results Rally planned for next Monday in Greenfield!

Kimberly Guilfoyle and I look forward to joining Governor Eric Holcomb, Mike Braun, Greg Pence and Indiana's statewide team to share our thoughts on the 2018 elections.

Make sure to **[RSVP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5189705c8&e=1acd9bb3d6)[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce0a28f233&e=1acd9bb3d6) **letting us know you'll be there...and even if you can't make it, please** ****[make an emergency contribution to the Indiana Republican Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a295f1ccf&e=1acd9bb3d6)**!

---
| [See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea181c2063&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>")
---
| [See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dae48d85f2&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>")
---
| Your Republican Party staff and volunteers are working so hard to share the message and get out the vote, **and as you likely know, early voting is already underway. **

We've got solid conservatives on your Indiana ballot -- **folks like Greg Pence, who is ready to serve Hoosiers again. **

And then there is a KEY U.S. Senate race - where we need to _DEFEAT two-faced liberal Joe Donnelly_ \- as well as statewide races, legislative races, and all of the other contests down the ballot that are being decided RIGHT NOW as voters cast ballots across Indiana!

Let me tell you, **my Dad and I are HUGE fans of Donnelly's****opponent****, businessman Mike Braun**.

He's the conservative LEADER Indiana needs, and his campaign operation is working incredibly hard getting the job done on the ground.

If elected, I know he will be a tremendous ally in my father's fight to DRAIN THE SWAMP in Washington and pass his AMERICA FIRST agenda!

**** Again,****[please stand with the Indiana Republican Party with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 emergency contribution](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=969a795cbf&e=1acd9bb3d6) ****to rush critical support where it’s needed most!**

Joe Donnelly is desperate to dodge accountability now. But FAR too often he has been a Schumer-Pelosi ally in obstructing my father's agenda by any means necessary.

I know you agree - **Indiana needs leaders who will put hard-working Hoosiers and Americans first, NOT the special interests and coastal liberal elites!**

Please make your most **generous contribution** today.

_Kim and I hope to see you next week!_

For Indiana & America,

Donald Trump Jr.

PS: Help KEEP INDIANA RED on November 6th and elect great conservative outsider Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate, _so he can stand with my father and Make America GREAT Again!_ **[Make a secure $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 contribution today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b47bc3cbf5&e=1acd9bb3d6).**

** To RSVP for the rally I'll be attending on Monday with Kim, please tap or click [**here**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efc55bb4f9&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---

name: Team Gillum
subject: Hey, be like Gina
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073e7/844281168/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends, meet Gina.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073e6/844281168/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-gotv-fund?gpsid=13_55_4536&refcode=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
She is an 86-year-old rockstar super-volunteer from St. Johns County. Earlier this week, she danced it out with Mayor Andrew Gillum after canvassing all afternoon and knocking on nearly 50 doors.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help Gina, and hundreds of volunteers just like her, continue to get out the vote before Tuesday, November 6?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073fe/844281168/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-gotv-fund?gpsid=13_55_4536&refcode=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+Will+you+chip+in++ask++or+more+now+to+he")**

When you chip into our get-out-the-vote fund, you're making a difference right now. You're helping the college organizer who is reminding students at the University of Miami to vote, the worker who knocks on doors after their 10-hour shift, and volunteers like Gina connect with voters in diverse neighborhoods across the state.

**[So please, chip in $5 or more to help us keep getting out the vote for Mayor Gillum.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073f1/844281168/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-gotv-fund?gpsid=13_55_4536&refcode=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++or+more+to+help+")**

These last few weeks aren't going to be easy, so let's all be like Gina -- let's stay motivated, stay positive, stay tenacious, and bring it home!

Thank you,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073f0/844281168/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-gotv-fund?gpsid=13_55_4536&refcode=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=12+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073f3/844281168/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073f2/844281168/VEsHAQ/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=14+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367c/9e00690/534d6e30/240073f5/844281168/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=15+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181018_Gina_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")

"+" These last few weeks aren't going to be easy, so let's all be like Gina -- let's stay motivated, stay positive, stay tenacious, and bring it home! Thank you, Team Gillum "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Peg is why I am running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I decided to launch this campaign after Rep. Brat voted for the health care repeal bill that could have harmed Virginians like Peg, and I am in this race to fight for quality care for her and everyone in our community.
| | _I want to take a moment to introduce you to someone very special to me, Peter._ Peg Myrick is a retired middle school principal here in Central Virginia. She is one of our campaign's volunteers. She also has Stage 4 colorectal cancer. Peg began experiencing cancer symptoms more than two years ago now, though beforehand she had no health problems, and as she puts it, "no worries in the world" before her diagnosis at age 36. She had good health insurance through her work, but she had to retire as she underwent treatment and lost her insurance. Peg was able to gain new insurance coverage through her spouse and is still receiving treatment today. She has been volunteering with us because she believes everyone should have access to affordable health care, **and she believes Rep. Dave Brat 's vote to undermine critical protections for people with pre-existing health conditions is disqualifying.** Peg is a true inspiration to me and to everyone on our campaign staff. Here is a photo of the two of us, taken outside the VA-7 debate on Monday: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/IACCygLmGGvQi6CPcCTjakdF5inFsXU045SDUYgcGv8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **Peg is why I am running, Peter.** I decided to launch this campaign after Rep. Brat voted for the health care repeal bill that could have harmed Virginians like Peg, and I am in this race to fight for quality care for her and everyone in our community. Peg asked that I share her story with you. She says she would be honored if others [**contributed**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/IACCygLmGGvQi6CPcCTjakdF5inFsXU045SDUYgcGv8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) to support her efforts to help our campaign, and as always, [**if you would like to lend a hand you may do so here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/IACCygLmGGvQi6CPcCTjakdF5inFsXU045SDUYgcGv8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/IACCygLmGGvQi6CPcCTjakdF5inFsXU045SDUYgcGv8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/IACCygLmGGvQi6CPcCTjakdF5inFsXU045SDUYgcGv8=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rB2CxenN4Y0RraHJoB6AV3_qa-F0bOZUFNGz_HQkVbg=/_Omc7p6KOqc7norktmI_qnneUtxZ50ltFGoL2IyIveU=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

body:
Friend,

What a week so far for our opponent, Bob Hugin. After releasing what _Talking Points Memo_ called "One of the worst campaign attack ads of 2018" \- publication after publication has come out condemning Hugin and has New Jerseyans across the state calling for it to be taken down.

We know this is a hail mary attempt from a desperate and deceptive man. We also know that we can stop Hugin's lies in their tracks. That's why we have just released a new ad to set the record straight once and for all.

name: Gabby Giffords, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
The NRA is trying to beat Stacey. We can't let them. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa729/34a064cc/ef070da/70d09f6/1287324472/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to Stacey Abrams' campaign for Governor. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is just so important. As you read this, the NRA is launching a massive ad campaign attacking Stacey. And from what I've seen, it's one that is set to run through the election. Now, I've seen a lot of politicians who are too scared to take on the NRA. But not Stacey. She has exemplified courage, strength, and integrity -- that was clear from the moment I met her. As a legislator, time and time again, Stacey prioritized the safety of our communities ahead of the profits of the gun manufacturers. She has consistently opposed Campus Carry, pushed to require universal background checks, and will work to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers. Stacey is the only candidate in this race with a proven track record of working to keep Georgians safe - at home, at work, and in the classroom. Now the NRA wants to make her pay the price for that. But we don't have to let them. We can make the NRA pay a price for trying to buy this election. So that's why I am asking: ****[Can you make a $3 donation to Stacey Abrams' campaign for Governor right now to say you will NEVER let the NRA buy this election? This is just so important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa729/34a064cc/ef070da/70d09f7/1287324472/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDE4MTguMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101818.3-full")**** We need to send a powerful message right now: We've had enough of the NRA buying our candidates and elections. We are ready for courageous champions like Stacey Abrams to lead us forward - and we are ready to pitch in to get her there. Courage, Gabby Giffords
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa729/34a064cc/ef070da/70d09f7/1287324472/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDE4MTguMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101818.3-full")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gosar=204=20Congress=20Team?=
subject: Dangerous amount of immigrants headed to Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f896b080950d/dangerous-amount-of-immigrants-headed-to-arizona-536829?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Friends,

Six months ago hundreds of illegal immigrants from Central America traveling in a caravan arrived in Mexico seeking asylum in the United States. Hundreds were allowed to cross into the state of Arizona.

This week, thousands more illegal immigrants are traveling by caravan through Mexico to the United States.

[_We must STOP the flow of illegal immigrants into Arizona. _](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=18358b146c&e=7ca82c1e3d)

Congress must act or we will continue to have "in effect" open borders, with families entering the country illegally, all as a result of weak U.S. policies along Arizona’s southern border. "These illegals are being paid by leftists in some cases to crash our border and make fake claims of asylum"

**The stakes are high in this midterm election and we must make sure to vote. **[Will you stand with me to ensure my re-election to Congress and make a contribution today? ](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=dcbb7aed41&e=7ca82c1e3d)

I will continue to take a stand with President Trump; we will not tolerate the blatant disregard for our border and sovereignty.
