Lou Barletta has outspent Bob in Johnstown, putting more ads on the air and spreading lies about Bob's record. He has accused Bob -- a Senator who has passed landmark laws to make life better for Americans with disabilities and to hold colleges accountable for campus sexual assault, who has worked across the aisle to fund critical technical job training programs -- of not doing anything for Pennsylvanians. That's ridiculous and it's wrong.

This grassroots team always shows up for Bob when it matters -- can you help Bob raise $17,000 for his rapid response fund by midnight tonight?](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Ready to lead
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367e/9e00690/53a1fc59/24007825/747774624/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181018_R2Lead_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181018_R2Lead_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx")
Friends,

Hurricane Michael was the worst storm to hit the Panhandle in more than a century. Just in Tallahassee, more than 110,000 residents lost power. But, within six days -- and under Mayor Andrew Gillum and the city's leadership -- 99% of residents had their power restored.

In the aftermath of the storm, Mayor Gillum showed Floridians all across the state what many have known for months: **He is ready to lead Florida forward as our next Governor.**

Throughout the storm, Mayor Gillum was a constant presence around the city, warning residents about the hurricane's dangers, meeting with key groups, and assisting in clean-up efforts. But now, he's back on the campaign trail to bring it home.

>From fighting to make affordable healthcare a right and protecting coverage for folks with pre-existing conditions to investing in our public schools, students, and teachers and cleaning up our environment, Mayor Gillum has the plans and vision to put everyday Floridians first.

He just needs our help to win on Tuesday, November 6.

**[So please, chip in $5 or more now. Together, we can bring it home.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb367e/9e00690/53a1fc59/2400783a/747774624/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4541&refcode=em18_181018_R2Lead_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181018_R2Lead_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=8+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++or+more+now+Toge")**

Thank you,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Tim Kaine
subject: This weekend, next weekend, or the one after that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
We have just three weekends left of the campaign so I have a simple ask: -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, after campaigning for awhile you learn the importance of asking. I have to ask for a lot of things: Your vote, your donations, your time - and it's important to me that I explain to you why I'm asking and _why_ it matters.

We have just three weekends left of the campaign so I have a simple ask: **Will you spend some time at least one of these three weekends volunteering in your community to help elect Democrats?** We are now in what we call "Get Out the Vote" shifts. These shifts use our team's data to have the conversations we need to have with the exact people we need to have them with. **I hope you 'll sign up for a GOTV shift, they are a lot of fun and the energy is palpable:**
* **Events on weekend of[10/20](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1af/4253632800/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-10-20T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+1020&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field") \- [10/21](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1ae/4253632800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-10-21T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+1021&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field")**

* **Events on weekend of[10/27](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1ad/4253632800/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-10-27T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+1027&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field") \- [10/28](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1ac/4253632800/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-10-27T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+1028&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field")**

* **Events on[11/3](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a3/4253632800/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-11-03T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+113&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field"), [11/4](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a2/4253632800/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-11-04T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+114&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field"), [11/5](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a1/4253632800/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-11-05T05%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+115&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field") and [11/6](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a0/4253632800/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDExMiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?address=20112&date=2018-11-06T05%3A00%3A00.000Z&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+116&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field") (most important)**

If you can't make it out to volunteer, that's okay, but I do have one more ask for you: **Will you donate to our Get Out the Vote efforts to support our volunteers while they do this important work?**

Your support here will make a huge difference out in the field, so if you can help today please use this link to send a direct donation to our on-the-ground efforts in these final three weeks: [https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a5/4253632800/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field")

Thanks for letting me ask these things of you, Derek.

Sincerely,

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1024/3e0906/77c9fc7f/3e37f1a4/4253632800/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181018_1_FR_TK_field&source=20181018_1_FR_TK_field")

Everyone said this was going to be a tough race, friends.
And they're right - there's no doubt that this race will be tough until the end. But I'm not afraid of a challenge, so I'm counting on you, friends: **[_Can you give $5 or more right now - anything you can - to help me flip New Hampshire blue?_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a42/d0ce7de/501a0f62/9cdb023/4224511347/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk175-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

But I have one message for them: **Do not underestimate this team and the power of our grassroots movement.**

"https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk175-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://mollykelly.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk175-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a42/d0ce7de/501a0f62/9cdb023/4224511347/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTc1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk175-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
